title: Unleash The Power of monday.com (Event Date)
excerpt:
Hi Juliette, 
Our event Unleash The Power of monday.com has been added into the calendar on the wrong date. It should be Wednesday 10th July, can you please amend? 
Thanks 
Becky

posts.author: BeckyRichards (Becky Richards)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Juliette,

Our event Unleash The Power of monday.com has been added into the calendar on the wrong date. It should be Wednesday 10th July, can you please amend?

Thanks
Becky
